title: hque now shows up on Google, AI search, and shared links
description: Our public pages — homepage, pricing, FAQ, blog, and every blog post — are now fully readable by Google, ChatGPT, and other AI assistants, with unique titles, descriptions, and a branded preview image when you share a link. Your logged-in workspace stays private and out of search.

title: Compare plans at a glance
description: The pricing page now has a full feature-by-feature comparison table across Starter, Pro, and Business, so you can see exactly what each plan includes before you choose.

title: Branded login page for your agency
description: Your agency now has its own sign-in page at h-que.com/your-workspace — showing your own logo instead of HQue. Find and copy your link in Settings → Agency Info.

title: White-label your workspace (Business plan)
description: On the Business plan, your own logo replaces HQue across your workspace once you're signed in. Upload your logo in Settings → Agency Info.

title: Add your logo when you subscribe
description: When you start a paid plan, you're prompted to upload your agency logo so your branding is ready from day one.
